products.title: PTU-7000-4B With Cable

body_html.h3: One of the Renowned Mic Systems from Phenyx Pro
body_html.p: The PTU-7000 wireless system can offer you extraordinary crispy audio and reliable performance - for an unmatchable price. The receiver is capable of scanning for available frequencies so you don't need to worry about dropouts. It has never been easier to get on stage with the confidence you should have.

ul.li: Auto-scan function to locate the best frequency nearby.
Crystal clear audio quality with cardioid pickup pattern to minimize noise.
Sturdy all-metal construction for both receivers and handheld mics.
Rack-mountable with built-in rack ears for easy operation.
Four XLR outputs for each channel and one 1/4" TS unbalanced mixed output for combined audio.
Up to 328ft long operation range.
> 8 hours battery life for each transmitter.

4-channel design with selectable frequencies in 500MHz frequency band. Channel 1: 538.3 - 550MHz (40 channels). Channel 2: 554.8 - 566.5MHz (40 channels). Channel 3: 571.3 - 583MHz (40 channels). Channel 4: 587.8 - 597.4 MHz (40 channels).

options.name: PCBL-4IN1 4-Channel XLR Snake Cable – Available in 3ft, 6ft, 10ft (Length)

products.title: PTM-10-2B | UHF Stereo Wireless In-Ear Monitor System

body_html.h3: Empower Immersive Stereo Monitoring
body_html.p: The PTM-10 emerges as an ideal stage partner for discerning music enthusiasts and professional performers. It provides an immersive stereo sound monitoring experience to let you hear the difference. With multiple customizable functions, it empowers you to fine-tune your monitor mix and boss the sound.

ul.li: Immersive stereo monitoring experience with up to 93% sound separation to hear the difference.
Exceptional, pure, distortion-free sound performance without latency.
The PAD button lowers the input gain to prevent loud input sources from overloading and clipping the preamplifier.
The powerful receiver features multiple practical functions, including stereo/mono selection, balance, equalizer, limiter, and lock functions.
Quick IR sync and one-touch frequency selection for fuss-free operation.
The adapter cord tie-off for manageable cabling.
Included metal rackmount kit for the professional workflow.
The black PVC carrying case protects the system while in transit.

li.span: Up to 160ft/50m of free operation range.

ul.li: 89 adjustable UHF frequencies in 900MHz range for multiset operation. 905–925 MHz (89 frequencies).

products.title: PTU-71-1H1B with 4-Channel Audio Mixer and Mounting Clip

body_html.h3: One of the Renowned Mic Systems from Phenyx Pro
body_html.p: The PTU-71 wireless microphone system can offer you extraordinary crispy audio and reliable performance - for an unmatchable price. With the scan function, it's able to find the available frequencies so you don't need to worry about dropouts. It has never been easier to get on stage with the confidence you should have.

ul.li: Auto-scan function to locate the best frequency nearby.
Crystal clear audio quality with cardioid pickup pattern to minimize noise.
Sturdy all-metal construction for both receivers and handheld mics.
Rack-mountable. Easy to integrate it into your setup.
Two XLR outputs for each channel and one 1/4" TS unbalanced mixed output for combined audio.
Up to 328ft long operation range.
> 8 hours battery life for each transmitter.
2-channel design with selectable frequencies in 500MHz frequency band. Channel 1: 536.57 - 561.32 MHz (100 channels). Channel 2: 562.37 - 587.12 MHz (100 channels)

Rack-mountable. Easy to integrate it into your setup.
Two XLR outputs for each channel and one 1/4" TS unbalanced mixed output for combined audio.

> 8 hours battery life for each transmitter.

products.title: PTM-10-1B In-Ear Monitor System – UHF Stereo Wireless

body_html.h3: Empower Immersive Stereo Monitoring
body_html.p: The PTM-10 emerges as an ideal stage partner for discerning music enthusiasts and professional performers. It provides an immersive stereo sound monitoring experience to let you hear the difference. With multiple customisable functions, it empowers you to fine-tune your monitor mix and boss the sound.

ul.li: Immersive stereo monitoring experience with up to 93% sound separation to hear the difference.
Exceptional, pure, distortion-free sound performance without latency.
The PAD button lowers the input gain to prevent loud input sources from overloading and clipping the preamplifier.
The powerful receiver features multiple practical functions, including stereo/mono selection, balance, equalizer, limiter, and lock functions.
Quick IR sync and one-touch frequency selection for fuss-free operation.
The adapter cord tie-off for manageable cabling.
Included metal rack-mount kit for the professional workflow.
The black PVC carrying case protects the system while in transit.

li.span: Up to 160ft/50m of free operation range.

ul.li: 89 adjustable UHF frequencies in 900MHz range for multiset operation. 905–925 MHz (89 frequencies).

products.title: PTM-22-2B In-Ear Monitor System – UHF Mono Wireless with 2 Loop Outputs

body_html.h3: One Monitor Station. Diversified Monitoring Experience.
body_html.p: The PTM-22 wireless IEM system tackles the challenges of floor monitor in live performances, allowing you to freely move on stage, engage with fans, and share a monitor station with your bandmates while personalizing your monitoring experience. The flexible and diversified mono monitoring experience lets you focus more on your content. With convenient loop outputs, the exceptional entry-level monitoring solution allows you to better navigate your music adventures.

ul.li: Crystal-clear mono audio without latency lasts throughout your whole performance.
The PAD button lowers the input gain to prevent loud input sources from overloading and clipping the preamplifier.
The LOOP OUT design for flexible routing operation.
Two stand-alone mixes offer a flexible and diverse monitoring experience.
Selectable UHF frequency design to avoid interference easily.
Quick IR sync and one-touch frequency selection for fuss-free operation.
One transmitter base unit can add as many bodypack receivers as you need.
Rugged-built receivers and bodypacks with a sleek design.
Rack-mountable with brackets included in the package.
Up to 164ft/50m free operation range.
Operates in the 900MHz range. 902.35-927.6MHz (2x50 frequencies).

products.title: PTM-11-4B Wireless In-Ear Monitor System – UHF Mono with 1 Loop Output

body_html.h3: One Monitor Station. Diversified Monitoring Experience.
body_html.p: The PTM-11 wireless IEM system tackles the challenges of floor monitor in live performances, allowing you to freely move on stage, engage with fans, and share one basic monitor signal with your bandmates while personalizing your monitoring experience. The flexible and diversified mono monitoring experience lets you focus more on your content. With convenient loop outputs, the exceptional entry-level monitoring solution allows you to better navigate your music adventures.

ul.li: Crystal-clear mono audio without latency lasts throughout your whole performance.
The PAD button lowers the input gain to prevent loud input sources from overloading and clipping the preamplifier.
The LOOP OUT design for flexible routing operation.
One stand-alone mix offers a flexible and diverse monitoring experience.
Selectable UHF frequency design to avoid interference easily.
Quick IR sync and one-touch frequency selection for fuss-free operation.
One transmitter base unit can add as many bodypack receivers as you need.
Rugged-built receivers and bodypacks with a sleek design.
Rack-mountable with brackets included in the package.

li.span: Up to 164ft/50m free operation range.

ul.li: Operates in the 900MHz range. 902.35-914.6MHz (50 frequencies).

products.title: PTU-71-2H With 4-Channel Audio Mixer and Mounting Clip

body_html.h3: One of the Renowned Mic Systems from Phenyx Pro
body_html.p: The PTU-71 wireless microphone system can offer you extraordinary crispy audio and reliable performance - for an unmatchable price. With the scan function, it's able to find the available frequencies so you don't need to worry about dropouts. It has never been easier to get on stage with the confidence you should have.

ul.li: Auto-scan function to locate the best frequency nearby.
Crystal clear audio quality with cardioid pickup pattern to minimize noise.
Sturdy all-metal construction for both receivers and handheld mics.
Rack-mountable. Easy to integrate it into your setup.
Two XLR outputs for each channel and one 1/4" TS unbalanced mixed output for combined audio.
Up to 328ft long operation range.
> 8 hours battery life for each transmitter.
2-channel design with selectable frequencies in 500MHz frequency band. Channel 1: 536.57 - 561.32 MHz (100 channels). Channel 2: 562.37 - 587.12 MHz (100 channels)

products.title: PTU-6000-8B Kit With Cable

body_html.h3: One of the Renowned Mic Systems from Phenyx Pro
body_html.p: The PTU-6000 wireless system can offer you extraordinary crispy audio and reliable performance - for an unmatchable price. The receiver is capable of scanning for available frequencies so you don't need to worry about dropouts. It has never been easier to get on stage with the confidence you should have.

ul.li: Auto-scan function to locate the best frequency nearby.
Crystal clear audio quality with cardioid pickup pattern to minimize noise.
Sturdy all-metal construction for both receivers and handheld mics.
Rack-mountable with built-in rack ears for easy operation.
Eight XLR outputs for each channel and one 1/4" TS unbalanced mixed output for combined audio.
Up to 328ft long operation range.
> 8 hours battery life for each microphone.

8-channel design with selectable frequencies in 500MHz frequency band. Channel 1: 520.15 - 529.9MHz (40 channels). Channel 2: 530.3 - 540.05MHz. Channel 3: 540.9 - 550.65MHz. Channel 4: 551.2 - 560.95MHz. Channel 5: 561.5 - 571.25MHz. Channel 6: 571.8 - 581.55MHz. Channel 7: 582.3 - 592.05MHz. Channel 8: 592.5 - 602.25MHz

products.title: PTU-7000-4H With Cable and Microphone Mounting Clip

body_html.h3: One of the Renowned Mic Systems from Phenyx Pro
body_html.p: The PTU-7000 wireless system can offer you extraordinary crispy audio and reliable performance - for an unmatchable price. The receiver is capable of scanning for available frequencies so you don't need to worry about dropouts. It has never been easier to get on stage with the confidence you should have.

ul.li: Auto-scan function to locate the best frequency nearby.
Crystal clear audio quality with cardioid pickup pattern to minimize noise.
Sturdy all-metal construction for both receivers and handheld mics.
Rack-mountable with built-in rack ears for easy operation.
Four XLR outputs for each channel and one 1/4" TS unbalanced mixed output for combined audio.
Up to 328ft long operation range.
> 8 hours battery life for each transmitter.

4-channel design with selectable frequencies in 500MHz frequency band. Channel 1: 538.3 - 550MHz (40 channels). Channel 2: 554.8 - 566.5MHz (40 channels). Channel 3: 571.3 - 583MHz (40 channels). Channel 4: 587.8 - 597.4 MHz (40 channels).

span.br:
FUEL YOUR VOICE
WITH WIRELESS POTENTIAL
The PTU-71/7000/6000 series provides a flawless audio solution and unlocks more wireless potential to your sound performance everywhere, thanks to its tunable frequency design and automatic frequency management. There are three versions available: the dual PTU-71 system, the quad-channel PTU-7000 system, and the eight-channel PTU-6000 system. With its thumbs-up stability and robust bright sound quality, such an affordable and expandable series proved to be an ideal option for small-to-medium indoor or outdoor venues. It fuels your distinctive voice to light up the stage wherever there is a DJ party or band gig.

strong.span: Tap wireless potential at the very start

body_html.p:
Flexible. Expandable.
The 71/7000/6000 wireless microphone system series adopt the tunable UHF circuitry to fend against harsh spectrum conditions and shield from mutual interference. Adjustable frequency groups (2x100 frequencies for PTU-71, 4x40 for PTU-7000, 8x40 for PTU-6000) within a tunable bandwidth of 40 to 80 MHz (vary from receiver channel version) aims for tuning flexibility and interference-free operation. Simultaneously link up multiple systems and build your integrated rack!

One touch. All ready.
State-of-the-art Auto Scan circuitry scans the entire RF environment more precisely, so the receiver can quickly locate a clean frequency and deliver promising wireless performance. It guarantees fewer cutoffs and dropouts for your important moments. One-touch automatic frequency management prepares everything for you.

p.span: Professional circuitry plus four independent antennas improve reception. Reliable coverage expands up to 100m/328ft without interference, cutoffs or dropouts.

Dynamic microphone with cardioid polar pattern is designed for true sound reproduction. The system renders lush and natural audio for all types of transmitters, including the handheld, headset, and lapel microphone. Grab your mic and voice yourself to captivate and touch everyone by creating your own vibe.

options.name: PCBL-4IN1 4-Channel XLR Snake Cable – Available in 3ft, 6ft, 10ft (Length)

products.title: PMR-2 | Mono Wireless IEM Bodypack Receiver for PTM-11/22/33

li.span: WIRELESS PERFORMANCE: Operates in UHF band with selectable frequencies, free of interference and latency by utilizing UHF wide audio signal transmission. More than 20 systems can operate simultaneously. Wireless IEM system enables users to move freely on the stage and in the studio with operating distance from 140–164 ft in open space line of sight
EASY MONITORING: LCD display shows battery indicator, channel number, and group number. It also demonstrate RF/AF signal strength for easy monitoring the status of the bodypack receiver
VOLUME KNOB: ON/OFF switch on top of the bodypack receiver with volume control function, delivering precise volume control on stage
CLEAN MONO SOUND OUTPUT: Aim the IR window of the bodypack to the IR window on the transmitter (base unit) for quick pair up. Clean mono sound performance for simply and pure monitoring

COMPATIBILITY: Compatible with Phenyx Pro PTM-11 and PTM-22 and PTM-33 systems. Both the PTM-11 and PTM-22 and PTM-33 transmitters can add as many bodypack receivers as you want. People can hear the same mix as long as you tune all the bodypacks to the same frequency and sync with the base unit. For the PTM-22, people will be able to monitor two mixes

featured_image.alt: PMR-2 | Mono Wireless IEM Bodypack Receiver for PTM-11/22/33 (900MHz), System Parts, Phenyx Pro at MSMAV
PMR-2 | Mono Wireless IEM Bodypack Receiver for PTM-11/22/33 (900MHz), System Parts, Phenyx Pro at MSMAV

products.title: Two set of ACC01 Large Microphone Mounting Clip

h2.strong: Microphone Mounting Clip – Fits Wireless Microphones & Standard Mic Stands

p.strong: Perfect Clip for Large & Wireless Microphones
p.br: The ACC01 microphone clip is designed to securely hold large microphones, including popular wireless handheld mics . Whether you're setting up for a live performance, studio recording, or public speaking event, this clip offers a reliable, snug fit for larger-diameter microphones.

p.strong: Universal Fit for All Mic Stands
p.br: Featuring a standard 5/8-inch thread, this mic stand clip is compatible with virtually all microphone stands and boom arms. Built with durable stone-black PVC plastic and reinforced copper threading , it’s made to withstand the demands of daily use in professional audio environments.

li.p: Designed for large and wireless microphones (fits 30–36mm diameter)
Fits all standard mic stands and boom arms (5/8” thread)
Durable PVC shell with strong copper threads
Ideal for live events, studios, podcasts, and more

ul.li: Lightweight, portable, and easy to install

body_html.p: Optimize your setup with a rugged, reliable mic clip built to handle the big gear. The ACC01 is your go-to large microphone holder for any performance or recording scenario.

products.title: PTU-6000-8H Kit With Cable and Microphone Mounting Clip

p.strong: One of the Renowned Mic Systems from Phenyx Pro

body_html.p:
The PTU-6000 wireless system can offer you extraordinary crispy audio and reliable performance - for an unmatchable price. The receiver is capable of scanning for available frequencies so you don't need to worry about dropouts. It has never been easier to get on stage with the confidence you should have.
Features

ul.li: Auto-scan function to locate the best frequency nearby.
Crystal clear audio quality with cardioid pickup pattern to minimize noise.
Sturdy all-metal construction for both receivers and handheld mics.
Rack-mountable with built-in rack ears for easy operation.
Eight XLR outputs for each channel and one 1/4" TS unbalanced mixed output for combined audio.
Up to 328ft long operation range.
> 8 hours battery life for each microphone.

8-channel design with selectable frequencies in 500MHz frequency band. Channel 1: 520.15 - 529.9MHz (40 channels). Channel 2: 530.3 - 540.05MHz. Channel 3: 540.9 - 550.65MHz. Channel 4: 551.2 - 560.95MHz. Channel 5: 561.5 - 571.25MHz. Channel 6: 571.8 - 581.55MHz. Channel 7: 582.3 - 592.05MHz. Channel 8: 592.5 - 602.25MHz

options.name: PCBL-4IN1 4-Channel XLR Snake Cable – Available in 3ft, 6ft, 10ft (Length)

products.title: PTM-33-4B In-Ear Monitor System – UHF Mono with 4 Loop Outputs

body_html.h3: Innovative 4-channel IEM. Designed for Live Band.

p.span: The PTM-33 wireless IEM system tackles the challenges of floor monitor in live performances, allowing you to freely move on stage, engage with fans, and share a monitor station with your bandmates while personalizing your monitoring experience. The flexible and diversified mono monitoring experience lets you focus more on your content. With peerless 4 channels under one roof, the exceptional entry-level monitoring solution allows you to better navigate your music adventures.

ul.li: Crystal-clear mono audio without latency lasts throughout your whole performance.
The LOOP OUT design for flexible routing operation.
Four stand-alone mixes offer a flexible and diverse monitoring experience.
Selectable UHF frequency design to avoid interference easily.
Quick IR sync and one-touch frequency selection for fuss-free operation.
One transmitter base unit can add as many bodypack receivers as you need.
Rugged-built receivers and bodypacks with a sleek design.
Rack-mountable with brackets included in the package.
Up to 164ft/50m free operation range.
Operates in the 900MHz range. 902.35-927.6MHz (4x25 frequencies).

902.35-927.6MHz (2x50 frequencies); 530.05-554.8MHz (2x50 frequencies).

ul.li: Operates in the 900MHz range. 902.35-914.6MHz (50 frequencies).

products.title: PTA-CBL | 1/4 inch TS to TS Audio Cable (Pack of 2)

p.strong: Premium 1/4 inch TS Audio Cables for Clear Connections
p.br: The Phenyx Pro 1/4 inch TS to TS Audio Cable pack, offering two 100cm (3.28ft) cables for reliable noise-free audio connections. These durable male-to-male cables are versatile, linking wireless systems, audio mixers, IEM systems, and more, ensuring professional sound quality. The strong wire housing guarantees a clear transmission, making it an ideal choice for musicians and sound engineers alike.

- Features a male-to-male configuration, each precisely measuring 100cm or 3.28 feet in length.
- Durable and strong wire housing to deliver noise-free performance.
- Focuses on minimising interference, ensuring that the audio signal remains pure and clear.
- 1/4 inch plug connects instruments like wireless systems, audio mixer, IEM system, and other professional audio equipment.
- Package includes two of these high-quality audio cables, offering you the convenience of having a spare or the ability to set up dual connections.

products.title: PTM-10-2B | 500MHz UHF Stereo Wireless In-Ear Monitor System

body_html.h3: Empower Immersive Stereo Monitoring
body_html.p: The PTM-10 emerges as an ideal stage partner for discerning music enthusiasts and professional performers. It provides an immersive stereo sound monitoring experience to let you hear the difference. With multiple customizable functions, it empowers you to fine-tune your monitor mix and boss the sound.

The black PVC carrying case protects the system while in transit.

products.title: PMR-2 | 500 MHz - Mono Wireless IEM Bodypack Receiver for PTM-11/22/33

li.span: WIRELESS PERFORMANCE: Operates in UHF band with selectable frequencies, free of interference and latency by utilizing UHF wide audio signal transmission. More than 20 systems can operate simultaneously. Wireless IEM system enables users to move freely on the stage and in the studio with operating distance from 140–164 ft in open space line of sight
EASY MONITORING: LCD display shows battery indicator, channel number, and group number. It also demonstrate RF/AF signal strength for easy monitoring the status of the bodypack receiver
VOLUME KNOB: ON/OFF switch on top of the bodypack receiver with volume control function, delivering precise volume control on stage
CLEAN MONO SOUND OUTPUT: Aim the IR window of the bodypack to the IR window on the transmitter (base unit) for quick pair up. Clean mono sound performance for simply and pure monitoring

COMPATIBILITY: Compatible with Phenyx Pro PTM-11 and PTM-22 and PTM-33 systems. Both the PTM-11 and PTM-22 and PTM-33 transmitters can add as many bodypack receivers as you want. People can hear the same mix as long as you tune all the bodypacks to the same frequency and sync with the base unit. For the PTM-22, people will be able to monitor two mixes

featured_image.alt: PMR-2 | Mono Wireless IEM Bodypack Receiver for PTM-11/22/33 (900MHz), System Parts, Phenyx Pro at MSMAV

products.title: PMR-1 | 500 MHz - Stereo Wireless IEM Bodypack Receiver for PTM-10

li.span: WIRELESS PERFORMANCE: Operates in UHF band, free of interference by utilizing UHF wide audio signal transmission (Up to 89 systems can operate simultaneously). Wireless system enables users to move freely on the stage and in the studio with operating distance from 140 – 180 ft. in open space, line of sight. *For longer distance, please avoid thick walls, glass, and metal block
LCD DISPLAY FOR EASY MONITORING: LCD display has low battery indicator, and can show frequency number and RF/AF signal strength for easy monitoring the status of the bodypack receiver

FIVE MAIN FUNCTIONS: Bodypack receiver has L1, FO, BAL, LO, and EQ functions, which allow you select stereo/mono mode for the bodypack, lock the selected frequency for the bodypack, or adjust the tone/pitch of the music sound. Detailed description of the functions setup can be found in the manual. *NOTE: Need to select OFF for FO function to turn on the stereo mode for the bodypack
COMPATIBLE WITH PTM-10: Compatible with Phenyx Pro PTM-10 system. One PTM-10 transmitter can add as many bodypack receivers as you want

products.title: PTM-22-4B In-Ear Monitor System – 500MHz UHF Mono Wireless with 2 Loop Outputs

body_html.h3: One Monitor Station. Diversified Monitoring Experience.
body_html.p: The PTM-22 wireless IEM system tackles the challenges of floor monitor in live performances, allowing you to freely move on stage, engage with fans, and share a monitor station with your bandmates while personalizing your monitoring experience. The flexible and diversified mono monitoring experience lets you focus more on your content. With convenient loop outputs, the exceptional entry-level monitoring solution allows you to better navigate your music adventures.

ul.li: Crystal-clear mono audio without latency lasts throughout your whole performance.
The PAD button lowers the input gain to prevent loud input sources from overloading and clipping the preamplifier.
The LOOP OUT design for flexible routing operation.
Two stand-alone mixes offer a flexible and diverse monitoring experience.
Selectable UHF frequency design to avoid interference easily.
Quick IR sync and one-touch frequency selection for fuss-free operation.
One transmitter base unit can add as many bodypack receivers as you need.
Rugged-built receivers and bodypacks with a sleek design.
Rack-mountable with brackets included in the package.
Up to 164ft/50m free operation range.
Operates in the 500MHz range. 530.05-554.8MHz (2x50 frequencies).

products.title: PRDWR-2U | Metal Locking Rack Drawer w/ Pre-cut Foam

body_html.h3: Stable, Durable — Ensuring Peace of Mind for Your Gear
body_html.p: The Phenyx Pro 2U metal rack drawer offers durable, portable storage tailored for the PRCSE-6UD rack case. Constructed from solid steel with smooth-sliding rails and a built-in lock, it keeps wireless mics, bodypacks, and cables secure and organized. A customizable foam interior ensures a snug fit for your gear, making it perfect for touring, mobile shows, and live events.

Designed for Perfect Integration: Seamlessly fits with the Phenyx Pro PRCSE-6UD rack case, providing convenient storage for wireless mic, bodypacks, headset, and cables.
Customizable Protective Foam: Includes pre-diced foam inserts that allow you to tailor compartments to your gear’s shape, minimizing movement and protecting equipment during transport.
Durable and Robust Construction: Built with a solid steel body and premium powder-coated finish for wear resistance and long-lasting structural strength.
Smooth Sliding Rails: Engineered for effortless drawer movement, allowing quick and easy access to your equipment.
Secure Locking Mechanism: Features a built-in lock with keys to prevent unauthorized access and ensure your gear stays safe.
Compact and Lightweight: Measures 440 × 350 × 85 mm and weighs only 5 kg, making it easy to carry without sacrificing protection.
Versatile for Multiple Settings: Ideal for touring, outdoor events, and mobile stages, keeping your gear safe and organized wherever you go.

products.title: PWH-4200 | Wireless Handheld Microphone for PTU-52/5200/4200

body_html.h3: Reliable Handheld Microphone for Every Performance
body_html.p: Built for reliable performance in stage and studio settings, this UHF wireless handheld transmitter combines sturdy metal construction with flexibility. Its 30 selectable UHF frequencies ensure stable transmission up to 200ft (line of sight). The cardioid dynamic cartridge captures vocals with clarity and natural tone. Setup is quick and simple, with easy frequency switching via the SET button and fast pairing for seamless operation.

Reliable UHF Performance:
Offers 30 selectable frequencies within the 500MHz band, delivering smooth wireless transmission with an operating range of up to 200ft (line of sight) in open spaces.
Crystal-Clear Sound:
Features a cardioid dynamic cartridge specially designed to deliver clear, natural sound.
Easy Setup:
Enjoy quick frequency changes via the SET button under the battery cover.
Durability:
Built with sturdy metal construction for heavy-duty use.
Compatibility:
Compatible with Phenyx Pro PTU-52, PTU-5200, and PTU-4200 systems.
Note:
Battery is NOT Included

products.title: PWB-5200 | Wireless Microphone Bodypack for PTU-52/5200

body_html.h3: Phenyx Pro PWB-5200 Wireless Microphone Bodypack Transmitter

p.strong: Perfect replacement or upgrade for your PTU-52 or PTU-5200 wireless system

body_html.p: Bring your vocal performance to life with this premium bodypack transmitter — designed to seamlessly integrate with the PTU-52 or PTU-5200 UHF frequency-hopping wireless system. Whether you’re presenting, performing, or speaking to a crowd, this high-fidelity mic is built to deliver clarity, reliability and ease of use.

li.p: This listing includes only the handheld transmitter unit — receiver, antennas, cables or kits are not included.
Ensure compatibility with your receiver unit.

products.title: Blackmagic Design Audio Monitor 12G G3

body_html.p: The Blackmagic Design Audio Monitor 12G G3 is an audio monitor featuring a dual-subwoofer design with extra wide-range speakers equipped with Class-D amplifiers. The upgraded G3 version supports the new SMPTE 2110 input for improved broadcast integration. It features a 12G-SDI input, a balanced XLR analog audio input, a balanced AES/EBU digital input audio, HiFi audio inputs, and an HDMI 2.0 output. The front panel features multicoloured audio level meters and a built-in LCD for monitoring video sources.

Install the Blackmagic Audio Monitor 12G G3 in broadcast racks, audio on decks, video servers, and live transmissions. With the push of a button, you can switch between stereo pairs of the 12G-SDI input, making this unit great for monitoring alternative language tracks. The compact size is ideal for portable flyaway kits and broadcast trucks where space is tight or in edit and audio post-production facilities.

The Blackmagic Audio Monitor 12G G3 features a dual-subwoofer design to create a wide and smooth frequency response curve with crisp highs and powerful deep bass. The unit is powerful and loud enough to hear your audio in noisy environments, such as broadcast equipment rooms that have a lot of cooling fan noise.

The two big bright audio level meters on the front panel feature multicoloured RGB LEDs under each segment. You can select between VU or PPM or loudness scales with a choice of EBU or BBC meters. With lots of meter segments, you can monitor a very wide dynamic range from -20 to +18 dB, depending on the scale. In addition, you can meter loudness using standard loudness, K-weighted, or relative to full scale (LKFS) to normalize levels for delivery to broadcast TV and video. The bright audio level meters are clear enough to read in bright or dark environments. Use the included adhesive labels to change the meter standard on the unit.

The machined metal design is extremely strong. This allows for a robust chassis that produces better-quality sound without rattles and vibrations. The front panel features audio level meters, an LCD video monitor, and a headphone/speaker volume control knob. To select audio pairs, left and right solo, mute, and input, there is a built-in illuminated keypad and for private monitoring, there is a built-in headphone socket.

Blackmagic Audio Monitor 12G supports all common SD, HD, and Ultra HD video resolutions. The 12G-SDI input and HDMI 2.0 output also support high-resolution Ultra HD monitoring. The 12G-SDI allows you to work at resolutions and frame rates as high as 2160p at 60 fps, over a single cable. You can connect to Ultra HD TVs and projectors with HDMI 4K, and you can monitor any of the 16 audio channels on the 12G-SDI input.

The audio monitor can connect directly to 2110 IP video systems thanks to its compliance with 2110 standards for IP video. This standard specifies the transport, synchronization, and description of video, audio, and ancillary data for broadcast applications. The monitor supports 2110-20 uncompressed video, Blackmagic IP compressed UHD codec, SMPTE 2110-21 traffic shaping/timing, SMPTE 2110-20 audio, and SMPTE 2110-40 ancillary data. The monitor also supports the NMOS interface so connected 2110 IP video devices can function as a large virtual router.

The Blackmagic Audio Monitor 12G G3 features analog XLR audio, digital AES/EBU audio, and HiFi audio inputs. You can select between inputs quickly using the input button situated on the front panel. The 12G-SDI video input and HDMI 2.0 video output support embedded audio and connect you to high-resolution video technology.

You can use the Blackmagic Audio Monitor 12G G3 to convert from SDI to HDMI for monitoring with big-screen televisions or video projectors. Blackmagic Audio Monitor 12G automatically switches between SD, HD, and Ultra HD formats. You can monitor in high-resolution Ultra HD using the HDMI output with a single HDMI cable.
